questions.question: If activeId changes in a list of 1000 items and each item receives :active-id='activeId', how many re-renders occur?
options: 2 (only the previously active and newly active items)

questions.question: What is the props stability fix for passing an active selection to list items?
options: Use v-memo on each list item with the activeId dependency
Pre-compute a boolean :active='item.id === activeId' in the parent
Move activeId into a Pinia store accessed directly by each item
Use shallowRef for the activeId to reduce reactivity overhead

questions.question: Why do inline object props like :style="{ color: item.color }" hurt performance?
options: Inline styles are processed slower by the browser
They create a new object reference on every render, so Vue always sees a changed prop
Vue doesn't support reactive inline style objects
They bypass the virtual DOM diffing algorithm
